original_hypothesis.title: Genesis withdrawLeftAssetsAfterFinalized Drains Unclaimed Agent Tokens
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: Genesis.withdrawLeftAssetsAfterFinalized allows DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE (FGenesis factory) to withdraw ANY ERC20 token after finalization, including the agent token that users haven't claimed yet. There is no accounting check to protect unclaimed claimableAgentTokens balances. The FGenesis ADMIN_ROLE can call this via FGenesis.withdrawLeftAssetsAfterFinalized to drain agent tokens before users claim them.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The function lacks protection for reserved user claims. While intended for leftover dust, it can extract the entire agent token balance including amounts allocated to users.
original_hypothesis.config_evidence: genesis/deployGenesis.ts grants ADMIN_ROLE to process.env.ADMIN for FGenesis

proof_of_signal.pattern: No check that withdrawn amount preserves sum(claimableAgentTokens); can withdraw agentTokenAddress entirely

preconditions: ADMIN_ROLE holder calls withdraw with token=agentTokenAddress

initial_operational_evidence.suspicious_workflow: No reserved balance check against sum of claimableAgentTokens
initial_operational_evidence.exploitation_window: After finalization until all users claim

operational_questions: Is ADMIN_ROLE a multisig with proper governance?
How long do users typically take to claim?
Can a reserved balance check be added?
validation_requirements: Set up claimable tokens, then withdraw via admin

preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_1: Wait for successful genesis with agent token distribution
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_3: All unclaimed agent tokens transferred to admin-specified address
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_4: Users who call claimAgentToken get revert due to insufficient balance

potential_operational_impact.administrative_compromise: Admin can steal all unclaimed user allocations
potential_operational_impact.recovery_difficulty: Stolen tokens cannot be recovered without admin cooperation

execution_requirements_analysis.operational_timing: After genesis success, before users claim

investigation_priorities.on_chain_signals: withdrawLeftAssetsAfterFinalized for agentTokenAddress with large amounts
investigation_priorities.operational_anomalies: Agent token balance dropping below claimable sum
investigation_priorities.behavioral_patterns: Admin withdrawal shortly after genesis success

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
